homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 0
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This instrumental heavy metal track features a virtuosic electric guitar solo alongside bass and acoustic drums, all driven by a fast tempo. The music creates an aggressive and energetic atmosphere that perfectly suits high-intensity scenarios like video game combat scenes.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This track is a dynamic blend of guitar-driven rock and melodic playing, featuring a groovy rhythm that makes it perfect for getting moving. The combination of bass, drums, and electric guitars adds significant depth and energy to the composition. As part of an autosong recording, the piece creates an engaging atmosphere ideal for fans of upbeat rock music.

The piece would work well as background music for a contemplative scene in a movie or TV show.
